title: Temptable storage engine returns error: doesn't support update of indexes
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(id INT PRIMARY KEY, id1 INT, id2 VARCHAR(255));
SELECT MAX(id) AS m1 FROM t3 GROUP BY id1;
CREATE TABLE t4(a INT PRIMARY KEY, b INT, c INT, INDEX idx_b(b));
key_bug_features: Aggregate functions exceeding 255 cause storage engine errors
